verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus died for us Jesus, Jesus is our Savior

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how He loves us Oh how He cares for us Jesus, Jesus is our Savior

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus made us Jesus gave His life Jesus saved us Jesus saved us x2 Oh how great is our Jesus Oh how great is our Jesus!
